# services.legit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.legit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.legit.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable legit git web frontend. |
| `services.legit.group` | `string` | Group account under which legit runs. |
| `services.legit.package` | `package` | The legit-web package to use. |
| `services.legit.settings` | `submodule` | The primary legit configuration. See the [sample configuration](https://github.com/icyphox/legit/blob/master/config.yaml) for possible values. |
| `services.legit.settings.dirs.static` | `absolute path` | Directories where static files are located. |
| `services.legit.settings.dirs.templates` | `absolute path` | Directories where template files are located. |
| `services.legit.settings.meta.description` | `string` | Website description. |
| `services.legit.settings.meta.title` | `string` | Website title. |
| `services.legit.settings.repo.ignore` | `list of string` | Repositories to ignore. |
| `services.legit.settings.repo.mainBranch` | `list of string` | Main branch to look for. |
| `services.legit.settings.repo.readme` | `list of string` | Readme files to look for. |
| `services.legit.settings.repo.scanPath` | `absolute path` | Directory where legit will scan for repositories. |
| `services.legit.settings.server.host` | `string` | Host address. |
| `services.legit.settings.server.name` | `string` | Server name. |
| `services.legit.settings.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Legit port. |
| `services.legit.user` | `string` | User account under which legit runs. |
